params.description: Data table appears showing Weekend Screen Time (minutes) with four categories: Saturday 35, Sunday 30, Monday 40, Tuesday 25.

Empty horizontal bar graph template appears. Weekend Screen Time (minutes). Four category rows: Saturday, Sunday, Monday, Tuesday. Horizontal axis runs along bottom, marked 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45.

beats.text: Now a bar graph, also horizontal. Read the data, set the lengths of the bars to complete the graph.
Create the bar graph. Set all four bars.

validator.description: Student set all four bars correctly: Saturday 35, Sunday 30, Monday 40, Tuesday 25

params.description: Horizontal guidelines draw from the end of each bar to the axis, confirming Saturday 35, Sunday 30, Monday 40, Tuesday 25.

beats.text: You created the bar graph independently. Horizontal or vertical—you've got this.

elements.description: Data table showing Weekend Screen Time (minutes): Saturday 35, Sunday 30, Monday 40, Tuesday 25.

Horizontal bar graph in building mode. Weekend Screen Time (minutes). Four bars filled: Saturday 35, Sunday 30, Monday 40, Tuesday 25. Horizontal axis 0–45 by 5s. Guidelines drawn confirming all bar lengths.
